<tr> <td class="{{lines_level}}">{{icon}}{{name}}</td> <td class="{{lines_level}} big">{{lines_bar}}</td> <td class="{{lines_level}} small"><div align="right">{{lines_executed_percent}}</div></td> <td class="{{lines_level}} small"><div align="right">{{lines_number}}</div></td> <td class="{{methods_level}} big">{{methods_bar}}</td> <td class="{{methods_level}} small"><div align="right">{{methods_tested_percent}}</div></td> <td class="{{methods_level}} small"><div align="right">{{methods_number}}</div></td> <td class="{{classes_level}} big">{{classes_bar}}</td> <td class="{{classes_level}} small"><div align="right">{{classes_tested_percent}}</div></td> <td class="{{classes_level}} small"><div align="right">{{classes_number}}</div></td> </tr>
